status: CATALOGUE REVIEWED / AUTHORISED-PRODUCT BOUNDARY ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Cyclic melanocortin-receptor agonist peptide medicine/research product
mechanism_summary: Melanocortin-receptor agonism involving central melanocortin pathways. The mechanism by which the authorised medicine affects hypoactive sexual desire is not fully established.
evidence_maturity: United States authorised-product and phase 3 evidence exist for a narrowly defined premenopausal female HSDD population. Evidence does not validate universal libido, male erectile-function or sexual-performance use.
regulatory_headline: UNITED STATES AUTHORISED VYLEESI CONTEXT EXISTS FOR DEFINED PREMENOPAUSAL HSDD — CATALOGUE POWDER IS NOT AN AUTHORISED-PRODUCT EQUIVALENT
certification_blockers: Current United States product label and post-authorisation status
No automatic United Kingdom or European Union approval claim
Supplier powder sequence, salt, potency, purity and sterility
No equivalence to the 1.75 mg / 0.3 mL Vyleesi autoinjector
Cardiovascular, nausea and focal-pigmentation risk controls
